lines.speaker: Alisha the Hag
lines.text: Good day to you too, Blockhead.

lines.speaker: Alisha the Hag
lines.text: Now what do you want from the old hag of Pollnivneach? Hexes? Curses? Eternal youth? Poisons? You name it, I can brew it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I don't want any of that stuff, I'm new in town and I wanted to get to know the locals.

lines.speaker: Alisha the Hag
lines.text: I'm busy brewing potions, so if you disturb me again without reason, I will turn you into a frog!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry! I won't let it happen again.

lines.speaker: Ali the Hag
lines.text: Old hag indeed! I have a name you know!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does it happen to be... Ali?

lines.speaker: Ali the Hag
lines.text: Oh, it's actually Alisha, but they let me move in anyway. Not many hags about these days, and beggars can't be choosers!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So can I call you Al?

lines.speaker: Ali the Hag
lines.text: Only if I can call you Betty!

lines.speaker: Ali the Hag
lines.text: Now what do you want from the old hag of Pollnivneach? Hexes? Curses? Eternal youth? Poisons? You name it, I can brew it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I don't want any of that stuff, I'm new in town and I wanted to get to know the locals.

lines.speaker: Ali the Hag
lines.text: I'm busy brewing potions, so if you disturb me again without reason, I will turn you into a frog!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry! I won't let it happen again.
